title: Fix: 요즘 핫한 뉴스 3개만 요약해서 알려줘
goal: Command '요즘 핫한 뉴스 3개만 요약해서 알려줘' failed with: The news request failed entirely with a missing-text error and gave the user no summaries at all.. Suggestion: Fetch current news headlines from a reliable news source, summarize three items directly, and only use AI after the retrieval step succeeds.
